stories.title: Thunder Sweep Suns, First Team Into Round 2 (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
SWEPT. Thunder 131, Suns 122.

SGA: 31 PTS, 8 AST. HOLMGREN: 24/12. HARTENSTEIN: 18/12.

OKC shoots 50% from three. FIRST team into Round 2.

12-0 in Round 1 over three straight seasons. DYNASTY. ⚡

#HoopHeroes #OKCThunder #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Three straight seasons. TWELVE first-round wins. ZERO losses.

The Thunder are the most dominant playoff machine in the NBA right now.

SGA and OKC await the Lakers-Rockets winner. The West is on notice. ⚡

#HoopHeroes #OKCThunder

stories.title: Jokic Triple-Double Saves Nuggets — Series Now 3-2 (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
JOKIĆ WON'T LET DENVER DIE.

27 PTS. 12 REB. 16 AST.

Murray 24. Jones 20 off the bench.

Nuggets win 125-113. Series: MIN 3-2. Game 6 in Minneapolis Thursday. 🎲

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Minnesota had a 3-1 series lead. DEN faced elimination.

Then Nikola Jokić posted 16 ASSISTS and willed Denver to a win.

Series is 3-2. Game 6 is Thursday in Minnesota. The Joker is not done. 🎲

#HoopHeroes #Nuggets

article.headline: Jokic's 27/12/16 Triple-Double Keeps Nuggets Alive in Game 5

stories.title: 8-Seed Magic Take 3-1 Lead Over Top-Seeded Pistons (TIER 1)

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
UPSET ALERT. 🚨

No. 8 Magic beat No. 1 Pistons 94-88. ORL leads 3-1.

Bane: 22 pts, 5 threes. Cade: 25 pts and 8 TURNOVERS.

Orlando is ONE WIN from eliminating the top seed in the East.

#HoopHeroes #MagicNBA #NBAPlayoffs

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Cade Cunningham: 25 pts. Also 8 turnovers.

Detroit's No. 1 seed season is on life support. One loss from going home in Round 1.

The Magic are coming for everything. 🎩

#HoopHeroes #Pistons
